features.label: Address Bar Permission Icon
features.desc: Shield icon in address bar — click karo to see current site's Camera, Mic, Notifications, Location, Clipboard, MIDI permissions. 3-state toggle: Allow / Ask / Block. Color badge shows permission status at a glance.
features.howto: Address bar mein shield icon click karo. Shortcut: Ctrl+Shift+I

features.label: Site Permissions Manager in Settings
features.desc: Settings → Privacy & Performance → Site Permissions. Saari sites list with per-site accordion expand. Stats row (sites/allowed/blocked), search by domain, reset individual site or all.

features.label: Electron permission handler integration
features.desc: Permissions ab Electron session handlers se enforce hote hain — browser restart pe bhi apply rehte hain. Storage: permissions.json in %APPDATA%\vortex\storage\
